   \( 94 - 50 = 44 \)

2. Subtract 40 from 92:

   \( 52 \div 44 = 1.1818... \)

   \( 94 - 1.1818... \approx 45 \)

\( 94 - (92 - 40) \div (94 - 50) \approx 45 \)
